description_long: This rifle features a matte black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by tan polymer components including the handguard and adjustable stock. The rifle has a prominent Picatinny rail on top for mounting optics, and standard iron sights are visible. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped and made of polymer, matching the color of the stock and handguard. The magazine is a detachable box type, partially visible and integrated into the lower receiver. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a basic flash hider. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for tactical or urban law enforcement use.
description: A modern black and tan rifle with a polymer adjustable stock, standard barrel, Picatinny rail, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the tan adjustable stock, handguard, and black receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
